race.comment: SHIKANIC (7) returned from a spell last start with a strong win over this track and trip. Will be better for that latest run and another win looks on the cards. OVER YONDER (1) was in contention all the way and fought on for second last start over 1100m at Strathalbyn, making it two minor placings in a row. Has been tackling tougher opposition in town, so looks very well placed in this grade but this is his first look at the dirt. Big watch. RAYMOND'S REWARD (4) showed good early speed and raced on the pace last start before fading to finish fifth, only beaten 2.5L here. Expect him to push forward again and give backers a bold sight. GOLDEN TUNES (6) turned in a modest performance last time in town, after a dominant maiden win at Port Lincoln at the previous outing. Has shown good early dash in most of his runs, so expecting him to be more prominent this time.
